name: Texas Custom Credit Repair
description_short: Family-owned credit repair company in Texas offering dispute services, free evaluations, and same-day credit solutions with no upfront fees.
description_long:
Texas Custom Credit Repair is a family-owned credit repair business operating in Texas with over 25 years of industry experience. The company was founded by Harley David Walters, a credit industry specialist focused on the mission of "Building Credit For Your Future." They position themselves as a full-service credit repair partner committed to transparency, education, and reliable results for Texas consumers.

The company offers a tiered service model starting with a free credit evaluation that includes credit report review, personalized consultation, action plan development, and detailed credit analysis at no cost. Their paid offerings include a Comprehensive Credit Repair package (starting at $199) featuring dispute services, credit monitoring, progress tracking, and ongoing support, plus a Family Package Deal (starting at $299 monthly) designed for households needing joint credit analysis and family-focused solutions. All services operate on a no upfront payment model, and they advertise same-day service availability for urgent credit needs.

Texas Custom Credit Repair distinguishes itself through bilingual support via specialist Carmen Thompson, who serves English and Spanish-speaking clients across Texas. The company emphasizes personalized attention, family-owned operations, transparent processes, and same-day service capabilities. Their team includes multiple credit specialists and consultants dedicated to client support throughout the repair journey. Client testimonials on their website highlight quick credit score improvements, stress-free experiences, and satisfaction with their no-upfront-payment approach.

As a credit repair company, Texas Custom Credit Repair operates in a regulated industry subject to the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) and state licensing requirements, though the website does not explicitly display compliance credentials, licensing numbers, or detailed legal disclosures typical of this sector. While they promise results and cite client success stories, prospective customers should verify licensing status independently and understand that credit repair outcomes depend heavily on the accuracy and validity of disputes filed on their behalf. The company's pricing structure and exact dispute methodology are not detailed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free credit evaluation with no obligation or cost barrier to entry
No upfront payments required before services begin
Same-day service availability for urgent credit repair needs
Bilingual support through certified specialist Carmen Thompson for Spanish-speaking clients
Family package option specifically designed for multi-person household credit improvement
Over 25 years of stated family-owned operational experience in the industry
Dedicated credit specialists and consultants assigned to client accounts
cons: No licensing or credentials displayed on website; cannot verify regulatory compliance or CROA registration from available content
Comprehensive pricing starts at $199 but exact pricing, contract terms, and dispute timelines not disclosed on website
Client testimonials are generic and unverified; no third-party ratings, BBB accreditation, or independent reviews visible
Service area limited to Texas; no indication of national availability despite website prominence
Dispute methodology and success rates not explained; no specifics on what qualifies as inaccuracy or how disputes are filed
best_for: Texas residents with mixed credit reports who want a free evaluation before committing to paid repair services
Bilingual households (English/Spanish speakers) seeking personalized credit guidance with cultural competency
Families with multiple credit report issues who benefit from joint analysis and coordinated improvement plans
Consumers seeking same-day credit services without upfront payment commitments

diagnosis: Texas Custom Credit Repair is best suited for Texas residents seeking credit repair services who value bilingual support, want to avoid upfront fees, and prefer working with a family-owned business. Critical caveat: verify the company's CROA registration, state licensing status, and complaint history independently before enrolling, as these credentials are not displayed on their website.
services: Free credit evaluation and credit report review
Ongoing client support throughout repair process
Joint credit analysis for household members
Secure credit report access and scheduling
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
